name: EMA Momentum Scalp
description: Fast M5 scalp on XAUUSD. A bullish bar (close >= open) triggers a LONG entry; a bearish bar triggers a SHORT entry — but only when EMA-9 is active and RSI-14 is not at an extreme. Exits via ATR-based stop-loss (1.5x ATR) and take-profit (3x ATR), giving a built-in 1:2 R:R on every trade.
